ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the helm (sailor) */,
  "club" TEXT /* Name of the club the participant belongs to */,
  "sail_number" TEXT /* Sail number of the participant's boat */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "boat_type" TEXT /* Type of boat the participant uses */,
  "boat_class" TEXT /* Class of boat the participant uses */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating or skill level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_club FOREIGN KEY ("club") REFERENCES clubs ("club_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_date" TEXT /* Date when the competition takes place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the competition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the competition */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for participant registration */,
  "entry_fee" INTEGER /* Entry fee for the competition */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used in the competition */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition where the result was recorded */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who received this result */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement of the participant in the competition */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the participant based on their placement */,
  "time_started" TEXT /* Time the participant started the race */,
  "time_finished" TEXT /* Time the participant finished the race */,
  "time_difference" TEXT /* Time difference from the winner */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Penalties applied to the participant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., DNC, DNF, DNS) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailing club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailing club */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the sailing club is located */,
  "club_website" TEXT /* Website of the club */,
  "club_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the club */,
  "club_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the club */,
  "club_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the club */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the club */,
  "president_name" TEXT /* Name of the club's president */,
  "president_email" TEXT /* Email of the club's president */,
  "president_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the club's president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)
